Creation.title: Creation
Creation.description: An art creation generated by the user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created this art.

dataUrl.description: The base64 data URL of the creation.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate the creation.

stars.description: The number of stars/likes this creation has received.

createdAt.description: The time the creation was saved.

Like.title: Like
Like.description: A user liking or favoriting a creation.

userId.description: The ID of the user who liked the creation.

creationId.description: The ID of the liked creation.

createdAt.description: The time the like was created.

/likes/{likeId}.description: Stores user likes/favorites for creations to prevent duplicate voting.
